text: Coruscant was first named in the 1991 novel Heir to the Empire before becoming the Republic and Imperial capital on-screen in the prequel era.

source.title: Heir to the Empire (1991), Episode I-III

text: The TIE fighter sound effect was built from an elephant call blended with a car tire hiss on wet pavement.

source.title: A New Hope sound design notes

text: Yoda was primarily performed as a puppet in The Empire Strikes Back and Return of the Jedi.
Darth Bane is credited with formalizing the Rule of Two: one Sith master and one Sith apprentice.
Beskar armor is resistant to blaster bolts and can withstand direct lightsaber strikes for a short time.
The Darksaber was created by Tarre Vizsla, the first Mandalorian inducted into the Jedi Order.

source.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars / Rebels

text: Kyber crystals are the focusing core in lightsabers and were also weaponized for the Death Star superlaser.

source.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story

text: The line 'I have a bad feeling about this' appears across the Skywalker Saga films as a recurring franchise motif.
Grand Admiral Thrawn first appeared in the Legends continuity through Timothy Zahn's Heir to the Empire.
Revan became one of the most iconic Force users through the events of Knights of the Old Republic.

source.title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic

text: Doctor Aphra debuted in Marvel's Darth Vader comic and quickly became a major anti-hero in modern Star Wars comics.
The Nightsisters of Dathomir use magick traditions distinct from standard Jedi and Sith Force training.
Andor explores how fragmented local resistance cells eventually unified into the Rebel Alliance.
The 501st Legion transitioned from clone troopers under Anakin to stormtrooper formations under the Empire.

source.title: Episode III / The Clone Wars / The Bad Batch

text: Starkiller (Galen Marek) is a Legends character from The Force Unleashed and is not part of current canon continuity.
